columns.extraction_plan: Median Progression-Free Survival (PFS) in months for the overall treatment group is not explicitly reported in the main document. Figure 4C and 4D on page 9 show Kaplan-Meier curves for failure-free survival, which is a secondary outcome related to PFS, but do not provide explicit median values. The text on page 11 mentions HRs for PFS but not median durations. The appendix (pp 5, 18, 19) is cited for more details, but is not available.
